creator: jadawin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Did you test your changes? I have following errors in poudriere:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/FASMSum.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/FASMSumx64.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/GASSum.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/GASSumx64.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/NASMHelloIoInc.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/NASMSum.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/NASMSumIoInc.asm
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/Projects/NASMSumx64.asm
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Can you update your patch, please ?
